name: vercel-ai-audio-player
title: Audio Player
author: Vercel
description: A composable audio transport with seek, time, mute, and volume controls.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced the AI SDK type-only audio shape with an equivalent local structural type.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced the AI SDK type-only audio shape with an equivalent local structural type.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
